nasb.text: For he will be great in the sight of the Lord; and he will drink no wine or liquor, and he will be filled with the Holy Spirit while yet in his mother’s womb.

esv.text: for he will be great before the Lord. And he must not drink wine or strong drink, and he will be filled with the Holy Spirit, even from his mother’s womb.

cnv.text: 他在主面前要被尊為大，淡酒濃酒都不喝，未出母腹就被聖靈充滿。

ccb.text: 因为他将成为主伟大的仆人。他必滴酒不沾，并且在母腹里就被圣灵充满。

csbs.text: 因为他将要在主面前为大。 淡酒和烈酒他绝不能喝， 还在母腹中的时候， 他就会被圣灵充满。
